sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66471" key="meso/nuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσόνυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠχος</itype>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pythag.</author> </bibl> name for <sense id="n66471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one of the planets</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
